title: ItPay V3 Payment Flow — From Checkout to Verified Payment
purpose: Teach the agent how to hand a checkout to the human, let the ItPay checkout page create provider payment, and verify payment state.
when_to_use: The agent has created a checkout and needs to hand it to the human.
The buyer wants to pay via Alipay or WeChat Pay.
The agent needs to wait for payment verification before confirming success.

commands.intent: create checkout from a canonical server cart and render ItPay checkout page handoff
commands.success_signal: ItPay checkout QR/URL is rendered for the human; payment intent is not created by the agent.

commands.intent: create service-execution quote lock and render ItPay checkout page handoff
commands.success_signal: The quote lock is bound to the original server cart item when present; ItPay checkout QR/URL is rendered for the human; the checkout page handles authorization and provider payment.

commands.intent: create service-execution checkout with machine-readable handoff
commands.success_signal: JSON with kind='checkout_handoff_required', next_action='open_human_checkout', checkout_url, display_token, qr_png_url, and brand_qr_local_path.

commands.intent: recover a service checkout after output loss, process restart, or token expiry
commands.success_signal: The existing checkout is reused and a fresh handoff is persisted before rendering.
Current checkout status, any payment intents, and buyer session state.

payment_flow_states.quote_bound: Checkout created, no payment intent yet. Show the ItPay checkout QR/URL to the human.
payment_flow_states.payment_pending: Payment intent created, waiting for buyer to complete payment.
payment_flow_states.payment_succeeded: Payment verified via SSE event payment_intent.verified.

agent_rules: Do not call itpay pay or use --pay for the normal buyer flow; those are operator escape hatches.
The human opens the ItPay checkout page first; the page handles authorization and creates the Alipay/WeChat payment intent.
For JSON output, render brand_qr_local_path or qr_png_url to the human; do not render provider qr.alipay.com directly.
After timeout, re-run checkout --id ... --token ... to check current state before retrying.
Payment success is confirmed ONLY by backend events, not by QR display or buyer claim.

next_docs.condition: Payment verified, need to check order state
Need to understand render behavior per host
